title: ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE
description: Push the boundaries of machine intelligence. Build autonomous agents, generative models, or predictive systems that solve real-world underground problems.

title: CYBERSECURITY & WEB3
description: Defend the realm or break the unbreakable. Develop zero-trust architectures, decentralized identities, or next-gen intrusion detection systems.

title: HEALTH TECH
description: Save lives with code. Create telemedicine platforms, AI diagnostics, or mental health companions that operate seamlessly in low-bandwidth environments.

title: ED-TECH
description: Democratize knowledge. Build gamified learning platforms, peer-to-peer tutoring networks, or accessible skill-building tools for the masses.

title: OPEN INNOVATION
description: No rules. No limits. If your idea doesn't fit into the above categories but has the potential to change the game, this is your arena.
